title: astragalus hypogaeus
intro: Astragalus hypogaeus, also known as the subterranean astragalus, is a type of plant species native to China and other parts of Asia. It belongs to the legume family and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects. Astragalus hypogaeus has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving immune function, and enhancing cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, and is often combined with other herbs to create medicinal tonics and formulas.
